prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年西南财经大学在上海综合科类最低录取位次分别为约6617名→6457名→7242名→11919名→8117名。2024年出现异常大幅下滑（物理必选组跌至11919名） ，2025年强势回升至8117名，近两年波动剧烈，2025年基准位次约8117名；该校在上海综合科类招生计划持续缩减：2021年22人→2022年18人→2023年18人→2024 年16人→2025年15人；2026年计划维持15人，与2025年持平，无扩招缓解效应。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西南财经大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年 主榜第66名，近年排名稳定在65–76区间，属于财经类头部院校；2026年高考周期声誉评价为中性/混合，无显著负面舆情事件；抖音综合热度排名第92位（评价 为一般），短视频平台曝光量处于中低水平，未出现异常关注信号；历史投档异常记录中未见该校在沪断档信号；第五轮学科评估：应用经济学A+（全国顶尖） 、工商管理A、统计学A-，三大核心学科实力突出，与该校金融学类、会计学、工商管理类、统计学类等招生专业高度对应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济大类2024年 专业热度评估为"分化观望"，较2023年小幅升温但仍存分歧；会计/财务/审计评估为"推荐"，整体财经类专业报考意愿趋于理性分化 。上海市2026年普通高考考生总数约66700人，较2025年49276人增长约35.4%，竞争显著加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次8117 名、2026年招生计划持平（无扩招缓解）、上海市考生总数大幅增长约35%导致竞争加剧、学校声誉平稳且财经类专业热度分化等关键因素，预计2026年录取位次较2025年小幅后 移（数字增大）。预测最低录取位次约8317名，波动区间7817–8817名。

- 金融学类（含金融学、证券与期货方向、双语实验班等）

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

- 精算学
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约8317名，区间7817–8817名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档专业为主力填报（工商管理类会计学院方向、金融工程、计算机拔尖班等），一档专业（金融学类、会计学 CPA方向）可作为冲刺选择，三档专业（统计学类、精算学、数字经济等）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<7817名）可重点冲击一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Southwestern University of Finance and Economics in Shanghai's comprehensive subject category were approximately 6617 → 6457 → 7242 → 11919 → 8117. In 2024, there was an abnormal sharp decline (physics-required group dropped to 11919), and in 2025, it strongly rebounded to 8117, with significant fluctuations in the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 8117. The university's enrollment plan in Shanghai's comprehensive subject category has been continuously shrinking: 22 in 2021 → 18 in 2022 → 18 in 2023 → 16 in 2024 → 15 in 2025. The 2026 plan remains at 15, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion to alleviate the situation.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 66th on the main list, with recent rankings stable in the 65–76 range, making it a top-tier finance and economics institution. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion incidents. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 92nd (rated as average), with low to medium exposure on short video platforms and no abnormal attention signals. Historical admission anomaly records show no signs of a cutoff in Shanghai. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation: Applied Economics A+ (top in the country), Business Administration A, Statistics A-, with outstanding core disciplines that highly correspond to its enrollment majors such as Finance, Accounting, Business Administration, and Statistics.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity evaluation of the Finance/Financial/Economics major category was 'differentiated and wait-and-see,' with a slight warming compared to 2023 but still divergent. Accounting/Finance/Auditing was evaluated as 'recommended,' with overall application intentions for finance and economics majors tending toward rational differentiation. The total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Shanghai in 2026 is approximately 66,700, an increase of about 35.4% from 49,276 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on key factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 8117, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan (no expansion to alleviate), a significant increase of about 35% in the total number of candidates in Shanghai leading to intensified competition, stable university reputation, and differentiated popularity of finance and economics majors, it is expected that the 2026 admission ranking will slightly shift backward (increase in number). The predicted minimum admission ranking is approximately 8317, with a fluctuation range of 7817–8817.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 8317, with a range of 7817–8817. If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choices (Business Administration Accounting School direction, Financial Engineering, Computer Top-Notch Class, etc.), use Tier 1 majors (Finance, Accounting CPA direction) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Statistics, Actuarial Science, Digital Economy, etc.) as safe backups. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<7817), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors.
